definitions.text: See-through, clear; having the property that light passes through it almost undisturbed, such that one can see through it clearly.
examples: The waters of the lake were transparent until the factory dumped waste there.

definitions.text: Of a graphical image or animated GIF, having parts that allow the background to show through.
Open, public; having the property that theories and practices are publicly visible, thereby reducing the chance of corruption.
